bucket.description: Specifies the name of the storage bucket where resources will be stored. Must be globally unique and follow naming conventions.

condition.description: Defines optional conditions for policies, consisting of a list of objects with attributes for description, expression, and title. Conditions must be valid expressions for policy evaluation.

member.description: Identifies the entity to which access or permissions are granted. Typically formatted as an email address or service account ID.

role.description: Defines the access level or permissions granted to the member. Must correspond to predefined roles within the system.
